title: Legal Advice at North Kent (Gravesend) Custody Suite
metaTitle: North Kent Gravesend Custody Legal Advice
metaDescription: Free legal advice at North Kent (Gravesend) custody suite for arrests in Gravesend, Northfleet and Dartford. Call 01732 247427 or text 07535 494446.
featuredImageAlt: North Kent Gravesend custody legal advice
contentHtml:
In brief

If someone is detained at the North Kent custody suite at Gravesend (Thames Way, Northfleet), they are entitled to free legal advice at the police station. Immediate family may help arrange representation by telephone.

What is North Kent custody?

North Kent (Gravesend) is a major 24-hour custody suite serving Gravesend, Northfleet, Dartford and wider north Kent. After arrest, a person is booked in, rights under PACE should be explained, and they may request a duty solicitor before interview.

How to arrange a solicitor

Call 01732 247427 for custody or a booked voluntary interview. If unable to call, text 07535 494446. Ask for Robert Cashman, Tuckers Duty Solicitor — the DSCC have our details.

Further information

See our dedicated page on police station cover — Gravesend & North Kent, the North Kent area hub, and help for someone in custody.

General information only — not advice about any individual case.

faq.q: Is legal advice free at North Kent custody?
faq.a: Legal advice at the police station under the duty solicitor scheme is free for most detainees being interviewed. This is general information only.

faq.q: Can family instruct a solicitor at Gravesend custody?
faq.a: Immediate family may contact us to help arrange representation when someone is in custody, subject to the detainee confirming instruction.

author: Robert Cashman
